## Meeting Purpose

[Calibration session to provide feedback on AI-generated articles and align on the tone and voice for Arena's blog content.](https://fathom.video/share/_X_VZwZK2ZuwJoqzU3hnEYr_JMmczo5n?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The initial AI-generated articles lacked flow, had a stiff tone, and sounded overly AI-produced](https://fathom.video/share/_X_VZwZK2ZuwJoqzU3hnEYr_JMmczo5n?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [Paola will provide examples of Arena's desired tone/voice and other assets to help guide the AI](https://fathom.video/share/_X_VZwZK2ZuwJoqzU3hnEYr_JMmczo5n?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Sadira will rework the prompts based on Paola's examples to improve the article quality](https://fathom.video/share/_X_VZwZK2ZuwJoqzU3hnEYr_JMmczo5n?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [The team will review the updated articles before publishing to ensure the right tone](https://fathom.video/share/_X_VZwZK2ZuwJoqzU3hnEYr_JMmczo5n?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)

## Topics

### Initial Article Feedback

  - [Articles felt stiff, lacked flow, and were clearly AI-produced](https://fathom.video/share/_X_VZwZK2ZuwJoqzU3hnEYr_JMmczo5n?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [Paragraphs/sections were too large and not well-divided](https://fathom.video/share/_X_VZwZK2ZuwJoqzU3hnEYr_JMmczo5n?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [Tone didn't match Arena's brand voice of being friendly, exciting, optimistic](https://fathom.video/share/_X_VZwZK2ZuwJoqzU3hnEYr_JMmczo5n?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)

### Providing Examples to Guide AI

  - [Paola will send examples of Arena's desired tone/voice by Thursday](https://fathom.video/share/_X_VZwZK2ZuwJoqzU3hnEYr_JMmczo5n?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Examples from thought leadership articles, brand guide, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/_X_VZwZK2ZuwJoqzU3hnEYr_JMmczo5n?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [This will help Sadira adjust the prompts for a better output](https://fathom.video/share/_X_VZwZK2ZuwJoqzU3hnEYr_JMmczo5n?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)

### Next Steps for Articles

  - [Sadira will rework prompts based on Paola's examples](https://fathom.video/share/_X_VZwZK2ZuwJoqzU3hnEYr_JMmczo5n?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [Generate new versions of the initial articles](https://fathom.video/share/_X_VZwZK2ZuwJoqzU3hnEYr_JMmczo5n?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [Team will review updated articles before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/_X_VZwZK2ZuwJoqzU3hnEYr_JMmczo5n?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [Goal is to get articles publication-ready while minimizing manual editing](https://fathom.video/share/_X_VZwZK2ZuwJoqzU3hnEYr_JMmczo5n?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Paola to send tone/voice examples to Sadira by Thursday](https://fathom.video/share/_X_VZwZK2ZuwJoqzU3hnEYr_JMmczo5n?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Sadira to rework prompts and generate new article versions](https://fathom.video/share/_X_VZwZK2ZuwJoqzU3hnEYr_JMmczo5n?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [Team to review updated articles for quality/tone](https://fathom.video/share/_X_VZwZK2ZuwJoqzU3hnEYr_JMmczo5n?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
